workshoptitle: Build a Dutch Gratitude Journal with Oracle APEX

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Learn what we're building and why

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Provision an Always Free Autonomous Database
tutorials.description: Set up OCI and create your free database with APEX

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Create the Database Schema
tutorials.description: Build tables, procedures, and seed 100 Dutch questions

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Build the APEX Application
tutorials.description: Create the app with authentication, daily question, and journal entry pages

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Implement Fuzzy Duplicate Detection
tutorials.description: Prevent repeated entries using FUZZY_MATCH with 85% similarity threshold

tutorials.title: Lab 5: PWA and Push Notifications
tutorials.description: Make the app installable and send daily 21:00 reminders

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Styling and Dark Mode
tutorials.description: Create a warm, beautiful journal interface with dark mode support
